name: job-search
description: Find matching jobs, capture postings, save LinkedIn profile snapshots, and tailor resumes to specific roles.

interface.shortDescription: Find roles and tailor your application
interface.longDescription: Search for open roles that match your preferences, capture job descriptions as structured Markdown, save LinkedIn profile snapshots, and get grounded resume-tailoring recommendations.
defaultPrompt: Find open roles that match my job preferences.
Capture this job posting as Markdown.
Recommend how to tailor my resume for this role.
